scope: local U3 observation calculus, authenticated synthetic trace evaluator, preservation certificates, composition algebra, deterministic validators, and adversarial proof machinery only; no empirical U3 result, U3 semantic closure, or UG1 passage is claimed

obligations.claim: The synthetic calculus is independently digest-anchored and canonical

evidence.testName: purely freezes and verifies independently anchored synthetic L1-L9
evidence.clause: canonical calculus fixture has an independent digest

evidence.testName: explicit trusted wrapper verifies predecessor Git custody
evidence.clause: predecessor bytes and commits are custody checked

obligations.claim: Every registered observation taxonomy member is represented exactly

evidence.testName: purely freezes and verifies independently anchored synthetic L1-L9
evidence.clause: all registered taxonomy members are fixture covered

obligations.claim: Observation schemas, versions, projections, and endpoints join exactly

evidence.testName: rejects schema version join
evidence.clause: observation schema versions join the registry

evidence.testName: rejects typed endpoint schema version
evidence.clause: typed endpoint schema versions join observations

evidence.testName: rejects projection version join
evidence.clause: projection input and output versions join schemas

evidence.testName: rejects observation unrelated projection
evidence.clause: observation source projections must exist

evidence.testName: rejects comparison unrelated source projection
evidence.clause: comparison projections must exist

evidence.testName: rejects isolated right-to-left projection topology reversal
evidence.clause: directional endpoint and projection topology is exact

obligations.claim: Applicability predicates and strata are total and evidence constrained

evidence.testName: isolates excluded applicability evidence and predicate authority
evidence.clause: excluded applicability requires evidence and a registered predicate

obligations.claim: Profile roots, lineage, versions, inheritance, and pairs are coherent

evidence.testName: rejects missing root profile
evidence.clause: profile ancestry requires a root

evidence.testName: rejects arbitrary profile version
evidence.clause: profile versions are semantic versions

evidence.testName: rejects parent major mismatch
evidence.clause: child and parent major versions align

evidence.testName: rejects parent lineage mismatch
evidence.clause: child and parent lineage identities align

evidence.testName: rejects parent effective loss
evidence.clause: children cannot erase inherited effective observations

evidence.testName: rejects pair omission
evidence.clause: profile pair coverage is total

evidence.testName: rejects pair orientation lie
evidence.clause: profile pair orientation is derived

evidence.testName: rejects unrelated profiles claim equivalence
evidence.clause: unrelated profiles cannot claim equivalence

obligations.claim: Comparison operators and directions obey the registered algebra

evidence.testName: rejects isolated right-to-left projection topology reversal
evidence.clause: right-to-left algebra cannot reverse typed projection topology

obligations.claim: Variance metrics, clocks, windows, units, and aggregation are typed

evidence.testName: isolates metric unit window and aggregation variance dimensions
evidence.clause: metric unit window and aggregation are independently attacked

obligations.claim: Mandatory observations and forbidden-loss sets cannot be weakened

evidence.testName: rejects mandatory observation loss
evidence.clause: mandatory observations cannot be removed

evidence.testName: rejects mandatory forbidden-loss removal
evidence.clause: mandatory observations remain forbidden losses

obligations.claim: Calculus parsing and hashing enforce finite canonical resource bounds

evidence.testName: isolates cyclic depth UTF-8 and field resource bounds
evidence.clause: calculus cycle depth UTF-8 and field bounds reject

evidence.testName: isolates evaluator cycle depth field and aggregate work bounds
evidence.clause: evaluator cycle depth field and aggregate work bounds reject

obligations.claim: Evaluation contracts bind exact semantic shapes and tool registries

evidence.testName: freezes bounded semantic shape registry and verifies calculus Git custody
evidence.clause: contract shape and calculus custody are exact

evidence.testName: isolates evaluation contract tool registry schema identity version digest and reachability
evidence.clause: adapter compiler and runtime registries enforce record schema identity version digest and exact trace reachability

obligations.claim: Trace events are integrity protected and authenticated to exact authorities

evidence.testName: rejects version, integrity, trust, causal, correlation, surplus custody, cycle, depth, and work attacks
evidence.clause: event integrity authority and version attacks reject

obligations.claim: Evidence and provenance records have exact authenticated custody joins

evidence.testName: rejects forged loss custody, malformed quotients, and consistently re-digested report topology/accounting
evidence.clause: evidence provenance and custody forgery rejects

obligations.claim: Causal order is checked against declared wall and monotonic clocks

evidence.testName: mixed wall/monotonic envelopes evaluate and policy attacks reach their authenticated checks
evidence.clause: wall monotonic and causal envelopes are authenticated

obligations.claim: All eight evaluation terminals are constructively reachable and typed

evidence.testName: E2E emits equivalent, refinement, abstraction, variance, violation, unknown, incompatible, and typed-loss terminals
evidence.clause: all eight evaluator terminal classes are reached

obligations.claim: Optional losses require authenticated typed loss and exclusive inventory

evidence.testName: rejects typed-loss observation overlap and mandatory-observation loss
evidence.clause: loss observation exclusivity and mandatory-loss rejection are isolated

evidence.testName: E2E emits equivalent, refinement, abstraction, variance, violation, unknown, incompatible, and typed-loss terminals
evidence.clause: valid optional typed loss is constructively reached

obligations.claim: Result witnesses and accounting cover every consumed input exactly

evidence.testName: rejects forged loss custody, malformed quotients, and consistently re-digested report topology/accounting
evidence.clause: report witness topology and accounting resist redigestion

obligations.claim: Report verification independently replays the evaluator from exact inputs

evidence.testName: E2E emits equivalent, refinement, abstraction, variance, violation, unknown, incompatible, and typed-loss terminals
evidence.clause: report verification independently replays every terminal fixture

obligations.claim: Certificates bind exact calculus contract traces report tools and trust

evidence.testName: creates an exact replay certificate with an independently anchored fixture
evidence.clause: certificate fixture binds exact replay inputs and independent digest

obligations.claim: Certificate verification replays authenticated evaluation rather than summaries

evidence.testName: rejects substitution, re-digest, version skew, surplus, trust, and bounded-resource attacks
evidence.clause: certificate substitutions version skew and redigestion reject

obligations.claim: Prompt provider probe model and harness domains remain explicit assumptions

evidence.testName: binds prompt context provider probe model and harness domains without generalization
evidence.clause: prompt context provider probe model and harness domains each change the certificate

obligations.claim: Composition joins exact typed intermediate endpoint identities bijectively

evidence.testName: composition is deterministic, aligns the intermediate artifact, and conserves relations
evidence.clause: typed intermediate endpoint bijection composes non-diagonal paths

obligations.claim: Guarantee discharge requires an unchanged exact domain and valid witness

evidence.testName: composition rejects artifact substitution, unsupported relation mixing, quotient mismatch, and assumption conflict
evidence.clause: domain guarantee mismatch and changed-model discharge reject

obligations.claim: Relation and quotient composition rejects unsupported directional algebra

evidence.testName: composition rejects artifact substitution, unsupported relation mixing, quotient mismatch, and assumption conflict
evidence.clause: mixed direction relation and quotient algebra reject

obligations.claim: Absolute and relative variance bounds compose by explicit typed algebra

evidence.testName: variance composition uses typed absolute and relative bound algebra
evidence.clause: absolute relative direction and operator variance algebra is tested

obligations.claim: Composition conserves terminal status losses assumptions and outer witnesses

evidence.testName: composition conserves violated unknown assumptions and outer witnesses
evidence.clause: violated unknown incompatible typed-loss assumptions and outer witnesses are not erased

evidence.testName: composition is deterministic, aligns the intermediate artifact, and conserves relations
evidence.clause: composed certificate replay is deterministic

externalDeferred.requirement: Empirical U1 strata determine the real U3 observation denominator
Independent authority freezes mandatory sets and U4 inventory interfaces
Native semantics and projections are externally established
Variance and fairness thresholds are externally calibrated
Preservation is run against real baselines
Identities clocks tool versions and custody are authenticated
An independent party replays evaluation and certificates
Claims remain limited to observed prompt context provider probe model and harness domains

prohibitedClaims: a V9 empirical U3 observation population is registered
U4 empirical inventories or denominators are frozen

skepticalReview.finding: local validators establish only a synthetic observation calculus, authenticated fixture evaluator, replayable certificates, and conservative composition algebra; empirical strata, native meaning, calibration, real baselines, external identity, replay, chronology, and domain generalization remain external
skepticalReview.disposition: external validation deferred; synthetic observations and denominators cannot be promoted or reused as empirical

allowed: U4 property tests over synthetic fixtures
forbidden: publication or reuse of empirical U4 denominators
downstreamBoundary.releaseCondition: verified external U1 and U2 population digests plus discharge of every U3-E1 through U3-E10 external obligation
